title.en: Hundreds of thousands of solstice epochs have p...

content.en:
Targeted research on the Heavenly Sword Plate, for Ye Tian, it was not difficult to study the ability of the Heavenly Sword Disk.

Time flies.

Hundreds of thousands of solstice epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally studied the ability of the Heavenly Sword Plate's Heavenly Sword Array, as well as the ability to integrate the Heavenly Sword Disk into the Innate Origin Domain, so he began to integrate the Heavenly Sword Disk into the Human Domain.

"Heavenly Sword Plate, melt!"

The Heavenly Sword Disk and the Origin of the Human Domain began to merge, and the Heavenly Sword Disk was used to suppress the origin of the Human Domain and control the entire Human Domain.

Airplanes!!!!

In the fusion of the Heavenly Sword Disk and the Human Domain, the Heavenly Sword Array was also perfectly integrated with the Human Domain, and the Heavenly Sword Array protected the entire Human Domain.

At this moment, the human domain seemed to contain a terrifying sharp aura, and if anyone dared to attack the human domain, it was equivalent to attacking the Heavenly Sword Formation.

Subsequently.

Several of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies sat on several formation nodes of the Heavenly Sword Plate, guarding here all the time, once someone attacked the Human Domain, he could control the Heavenly Sword Formation as soon as possible, forming an indestructible defense.

Now.

Ye Tiandu could sense the terrifyingness of the Heavenly Sword Formation, and he couldn't shake the Heavenly Sword Formation with all his strength.

"With the Heavenly Sword Plate, the human realm is worry-free!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

He didn't tell anyone else about this, nor did he tell the other patriarchs.

......

After becoming the thirty-fifth elder of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, almost all the major matters of the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance were decided by them after deliberation, and they controlled all the information.

Not only that, but he also had a share of the resource treasure land occupied by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

He may not look down on that share, but if that share is given to the human race, it is enough to cultivate many strong people.

The resources accumulated over a long period of time are still very considerable.

This is one of the reasons why many patriarchs want to become the first thirty-six patriarchs.

this day.

The first patriarch summoned many of his thirty-six patriarchs to a meeting in the Senate's hall.

Ye Tian came to the Hall of Elders, and many other former thirty-six elders came, but ordinary elders did not come.

Obviously, the content of this meeting must have nothing to do with ordinary elders.

In the midst of the splendid hall.

A venerable patriarch sat down.

Seeing that it was almost there, the first elder said: "Everyone, it's time for the shift change of the eternal dark abyss, who will guard it this time?"

Many patriarchs were silent, and their expressions showed reluctance.

Apparently.

No one wants to go to the abyss of eternal night.

The first patriarch said: "Fellow patriarchs, the thirtieth patriarch has already sat in the eternal dark abyss for 100 million to the Dao era, and the time has come, and it must be rotated. "

Then.

The thirty-first patriarch said: "First patriarch, we have all sat in the eternal dark abyss, Ye Tian doesn't seem to have been there, and Ye Tian has many clones, it should be no problem to send a clone to sit in the eternal dark abyss." "

When the other patriarchs heard this, they immediately nodded.

"That's right, Elder Ye Tian's doppelganger is very special, almost the same as the main body, it is naturally possible to sit in the eternal dark abyss!"

Others said from afar.

“......"

Ye Tian was speechless.

He didn't even know what the Eternal Dark Abyss was, so the guys recommended him to go.

There is no need to think about it, the Eternal Darkness Abyss must be a pit, otherwise, it is impossible for this group of elders to be unwilling to go.

"Elder Ye Tian, what is your opinion?"

The First Elder looked over and asked.

"Elders, what is the place of the Eternal Dark Abyss?" Ye Tian asked.

The First Elder introduced: "The Eternal Darkness Abyss can also be said to be an Innate Origin Domain, but it is a collection of negative forces from many Innate Origin Domains. There are negative forces in any world, and the same is true of the Innate Primordial Domain. The Great Array of Innate Origin Domains, which covers all the Innate Origin Domains, also has the effect of draining away its negative forces, and transferring all negative forces to the Eternal Abyss, which can allow all Innate Origin Domains to develop rapidly without being affected by internal factors. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Immediately, he asked again, "Elders, is there any danger in the Eternal Darkness Abyss?"

"There is danger!" said the First Elder, "The Eternal Darkness Abyss is filled with countless Abyssal Supreme Dao creatures, all of which have no spiritual intelligence and only know how to kill. The most powerful Abyssal Dao creatures were sealed by us in the depths of the Eternal Dark Abyss, and there were many Abyssal Dao creatures on the periphery, so in order to prevent them from rushing out, a Patriarch must be dispatched to guard them. If any one rushes out, kill him. "

"Is there no way to kill them all?"

Ye Tian asked.

The first patriarch shook his head: "It's useless, kill them all, it won't be long before they will be bred." And every time they are slaughtered, one or two elders may fall, and the gains outweigh the losses. Therefore, sealing the powerful Abyss Supreme Dao Monster is the best way. "

"Got it!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he agreed.

After all, these patriarchs recommended him to guard the eternal dark abyss, and he couldn't say no!

The 100 million Solstice Era is indeed a long time, but it will gradually pass.

Ye Tian asked the last question: "Is there a treasure in the Eternal Darkness Abyss?"

"There are really treasures!" the First Elder said, "The Eternal Darkness Abyss may give birth to Innate Primordial Treasures and first-order Supreme Dao Rule items, but almost all of them are low-quality first-order Supreme Dao Rule items, which are of little value, and almost all of them are in the depths of the Eternal Dark Abyss. "

That's right, too.

If there really is any amazing treasure, the first patriarch will go in.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian didn't continue to ask.

......

The Innate Origin Domain Alliance has countless innate origin domain central areas, inside a sealed region.

Ye Tian came here, and there were thirty-three layers of large arrays arranged here by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, layer after layer.

And Ye Tian obtained the permission and passed through the thirty-three layers of the Great Array, only then did he see the Eternal Darkness Abyss.

On the edge of the Abyss of Eternal Darkness, a palace stood.

A young man in red was there, blasting an abyssal creature that was trying to break out.

"Thirty Elders!"

Ye Tian appeared in front of the young man and said.

"You're the new Thirty-Fifth Elder, right?" the Thirtieth Elder looked excited, because he was finally going out, it was too boring to stay here, and he didn't even have time to cultivate, so he had to guard here all the time.

"It's me!" Ye Tiandao: "The first elder has an order, let me change shifts." "

"Thirty-fifth Elder, then I'll leave it to you here!" The Thirtieth Elder handed over the token to Ye Tian who controlled the formation here, and told him some more things, "Thirtieth Elder, don't enter the Eternal Dark Abyss, no matter what you see, don't go in." Once we enter the Abyss of Eternal Darkness, our strength will be suppressed, and if those creatures of the Abyss join forces and an endless number of creatures besiege you, you still have the possibility of falling. "

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.
